title: Coding and analysis protocol
author: Ramírez-Segado, Alejandra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper presents a detailed protocol for the analysis and coding of the documents and video games included in the review entitled ‘Video games and key competences’ development in STEM areas. A systematic review’.
steps_raw: This paper presents a detailed protocol for the analysis and coding of the documents and video games included in the review entitled ‘Video games and key competences’ development in STEM areas. A systematic review’.
